mapper.sql: SELECT ID, CONTRACT_ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT_COMPANY where CONTRACT_ID = #{contractId}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, CONTRACT_ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT_COMPANY
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_CONTRACT_COMPANY( ID, CONTRACT_ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contractId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_CONTRACT_COMPANY SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONTRACT_ID = #{contractId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, COMPANY_ID = #{companyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
id = #{id}
